com.auxilii.msgparser

クラス RecipientEntry

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.auxilii.msgparser.RecipientEntry

  • public class RecipientEntry
extends java.lang.Object
    This class represents a recipient's entry of the parsed .msg file. It provides information like the email address and the display name.

    • コンストラクタのサマリー

        (e.g. 'Firstname Lastname <firstname.lastname@domain.tld>').
